title: Vacancy for Hotel Manager at McDonald's India

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Hotel Manager at McDonald's India
jsonLd.description:
McDonald's India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Hotel Manager to join our dynamic team in Mysuru. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About McDonald's India:
McDonald's India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Barista Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with McDonald's India!
